/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/my_custom_interfaces/msg/hardware_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/beeboss/Desktop/ros_workspaces/ros2_ws/build/my_custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
